rationale: Phase 09 satisfies the approved destructive pre-launch cutover plan: booking-era Prisma models, runtime routes, actions, crons, utilities, UI surfaces, load tests, and booking-specific tests were retired; legacy bookmark routes redirect without Booking reads; contact-first listing/update/delete/review behavior is preserved; non-production Phase 01-08 defaults are enabled with production still conservative; projection/search/paywall/alert regression sets pass; and static scans over active runtime/test/tooling surfaces show no Booking model or retired cron/action entry points.
checks_reviewed: git grep active retirement scan over src scripts tests package.json vercel.json
residual_risks: pnpm run seed:e2e could not complete because no Postgres server was reachable at localhost:5433 and Docker is not installed in this WSL distro.
Broad Jest and Playwright were not run.
Historic docs and old migration files still mention booking-era terms as historical context.
